docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY ROBBINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAY KING IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBBINS, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, JAY $5,771.63 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,861.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,771.63 FILED BY ROBBINS, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-09-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JAY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBBINS, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT KING, JAY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JAY KING ON 01/25/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED."
